sourceSummary.oneLine: Package labeling content for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB, including symbols, label types, label positions, and packaging details.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines product and package labeling elements, warning symbols, label placement, and packaging size and weight.
keyPoints: Includes symbols for prescription use, warnings, radiation, voltage, grounding, disposal, manufacturing, serial number, medical device status, environmental limits, power, packaging, and lithium-ion battery.
Product labels are identified for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB.
Label positions include bottom of main body, bottom of collimator, X-ray tank inside the main body, back of the main body, and battery inside the main body.
Packaging may include or exclude a reinforced case, with stated size and weight.

concepts.name: Radiation exposure indication
concepts.evidence: Radiation exposure symbol used on operator console. Lights to indicate that an exposure is in progress. This is accompanied by an audible tone from the console

concepts.name: Protective earth
concepts.evidence: Identifies the point where the system safety ground is fastened to the chassis. Protective earth connected to conductive parts of Class I equipment for safety purposes.

concepts.name: Label position
concepts.evidence: Product label : Bottom of main body

concepts.name: Packaging with reinforced case
concepts.evidence: There are two packing methods: with reinforced case and without reinforced case.

evidence.claim: The document is package labeling for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB.
evidence.evidenceText: Product label  ① HnX-P1 ② HnX-PB

evidence.claim: The labeling includes a prescription use symbol tied to 21 CFR 801 Subpart D.
The radiation exposure symbol is used on the operator console and indicates exposure in progress with light and audible tone.
evidence.evidenceText: Radiation exposure symbol used on operator console. Lights to indicate that an exposure is in progress. This is accompanied by an audible tone from the console

evidence.claim: The product label is positioned on the bottom of the main body.
evidence.evidenceText: Product label : Bottom of main body

evidence.claim: The Beam Limiting Device label is positioned on the bottom of the collimator.
evidence.evidenceText: Beam Limiting Device label : Bottom of collimator

evidence.claim: The high voltage tank label is positioned on the X-ray tank inside the main body.
evidence.evidenceText: High Voltage Tank label : X-ray tank inside the main body.

evidence.claim: The X-ray warning label is positioned on the back of the main body.
evidence.evidenceText: X-ray warning label : Back of the main body

evidence.claim: The battery label is positioned on the battery inside the main body.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery label : Battery inside the main body.

evidence.claim: There are two packing methods: with reinforced case and without reinforced case.
evidence.evidenceText: There are two packing methods: with reinforced case and without reinforced case.

evidence.claim: Packaging with reinforced case has size 490 x 420 x 300mm and weight 9.6kg.
evidence.evidenceText: * Packaging size and weight (with reinforced case) - Size: 490 x 420 x 300mm - Weight: 9.6kg

evidence.claim: Packaging without reinforced case has size 490 x 420 x 300mm and weight 6.1kg.
evidence.evidenceText: * Packaging size and weight (without reinforced case) - Size: 490 x 420 x 300mm - Weight: 6.1kg

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present in the provided source text.
